summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing of Aether v2 self-contained module at /aetherV2/. All 34 backend pytest tests PASS (100%). All 18 router actions return 200 with valid JSON, including new schema_diff (with snapshots+changes shape verified), download_receipt (PDF magic bytes verified, >5KB), download_payslip (verified with valid payroll_id), AetherNotifier::shouldNotify threshold logic ('critical'=true, 'info'=false), and self-containment (renamed /app/includes/auth.php and aetherV2 still works). Adaptive schema (CREATE/ALTER/DROP) detection works. Action plan workflow approve+persist works (NewTest Donor donation persisted then cleaned up). Role gating verified: accountant gets HTTP 403 on schema_sync AND self_heal. Forecast intent reply contains valid YYYY-MM (2026-05). All 8 chat intents respond correctly. Frontend dashboard at /aetherV2/dashboard.php: light theme (rgb(248,250,252) bg), emerald accents, auth gate with overlay-login-link testid, 8 KPIs, btn-refresh/btn-sync/btn-heal present, card-schema-diff present with all 5 categorised cards (Tables created/dropped, Columns added/removed, Modified). Floating panel on /: launcher emerald gradient at bottom-right, light theme panel with Aether header, all 3 tabs (Chat/Health/Plans), all 6 emoji quick chips with testids, message send works, bot reply in light bubble, action plan card with green emerald styling and Approve/Reject buttons works end-to-end (clicked Approve → 'Executed successfully' confirmation).
critical_code_review_comments: All assertions from review_request validated. Self-containment proven: renamed /app/includes/auth.php to .bak and aetherV2 identity endpoint still returned 200 with super_admin role - confirms AetherJWT/AetherDB inside bootstrap.php is fully independent.
PDF receipt magic bytes (%PDF) verified, Content-Type application/pdf correct, sizes >5KB (receipt) and >3KB (payslip). mPDF tempDir fix at line 89 working.
AetherNotifier::shouldNotify('critical') returns true and ('info') returns false with default threshold 'high' as designed. SMTP/Fast2SMS dispatch correctly no-ops without credentials in .env.

schema_diff returns expected shape: snapshots[].{id,fingerprint,table_count,column_count,fk_count,taken_at}, changes[].{change_type,object_type,object_name,impact|impact_level,details_json}. Field name impact_level present.
Forecast bug fix verified: chat 'forecast donations' reply contains '2026-05' (valid YYYY-MM), no longer blank.
Role-based gating now verifiable - accountant@dhrubfoundation.org/admin123 password works (was broken in iteration_1, now seeded). Both schema_sync and self_heal return HTTP 403 for accountant.

Frontend: card-schema-diff renders all 5 required categorised cards with count badges. Light theme palette (#10b981 emerald, slate borders, white cards) consistent across dashboard and floating panel.
test_credentials: super_admin: sbrata9843@gmail.com / admin123 (works). accountant: accountant@dhrubfoundation.org / admin123 (now works - was broken in prev iteration).
seed_data_creation: Created donations: 'NewTest Donor' Rs 5000 (backend test, then cleaned), 'PanelTest' Rs 5000 (frontend approve-flow test, then cleaned). Temporarily renamed /app/includes/auth.php during self-contained test (restored). Created+dropped table aether_test_adapt during adaptive schema test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file: /app/backend/tests/test_aetherV2.py (34 tests, runs in ~7s). Endpoint URL is /aetherV2/api/aether.php (capital V2). Use email login, returns access_token, send as Authorization: Bearer. Plan APIs use 'plan_id' field. Schema sync changes carry 'impact' and 'impact_level'. Knowledge_search returns 'matches'. Floating panel testids: aether-v2-launcher, aether-v2-panel, aether-v2-tab-{chat|health|plans}, aether-v2-input, aether-v2-send, aether-v2-chip-{dashboard|health|top-donors|low-stock|forecast|audit}. Dashboard testids: btn-refresh, btn-sync, btn-heal, kpi-*, card-schema-diff, overlay-login-link. PDF endpoints are GET (not POST): ?action=download_receipt&donation_id=N or ?action=download_payslip&payroll_id=N. AetherNotifier CLI test: php -r requires bootstrap.php then notifier.php. Auth gate appears when no token in localStorage on /aetherV2/dashboard.php.
rca of the issue: No issues found - all features work as specified in the review request.
